params.name: Silver Treaty
params.description:
On Sept 5, 1283 BC, the earliest documented peace treaty in history was signed.
The Silver Treaty was a peace treaty between the Hittite king Hattusili III and the Egyptian pharaoh Ramses II to end the war. The Hittite king sent a draft of a peace-making agreement inscribed on a silver plate to Egypt, then the pharaoh drew up his own revision. The treaty stipulates that the two sides will never be hostile toward each other again and maintain a peaceful relationship forever. The Hittites and E …
